description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, orange-colored icing that drapes over the sides in a rippled, decorative pattern. The top of the cake is adorned with several green-and-white swirled dollops, each topped with a red cherry and a stick, giving a festive appearance. At the center, there is an upright ice cream cone filled with green swirled cream, and another cone lying on its side, along with a red-and-white swirled candy. The cake sits on a light blue, flat plate that provides a clean contrast to the vibrant cake colors. Small star-shaped sprinkles are scattered across the top surface, adding extra detail and playfulness. The overall look is whimsical and playful, suitable for celebrations in urban parks or street festivals.
description: A round, orange-iced cake with green-and-white swirled dollops, cherries, and ice cream cone decorations, displayed on a blue plate. The cake features playful, whimsical toppings and a rippled icing edge.
description_view_0: Front view shows the upright ice cream cone, several green swirled dollops with cherries, and the rippled orange icing edge.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the central cone and the arrangement of dollops and cherries, with the side cone more visible.
description_view_2: The side cone and swirled candy are prominent, with the dollops and cherries forming a semi-circle around the top.
description_view_3: The upright cone and swirled candy are most visible, with the dollops and cherries evenly spaced around the cake's top.
